Current Design Issues to Fix

❌ Labels too small — 10px uppercase text is barely readable on mobile

❌ Low contrast — muted text at ink/40% fails accessibility

❌ Spinners everywhere — no skeleton loading states

❌ Dense forms — Create Pot flow crams too much into scroll views

❌ Inconsistent borders — some 2px black, some 1px at 0.06 opacity

❌ No transitions — elements appear/disappear without animation

❌ Flat empty states — generic emoji + text, no visual engagement

END OF DESIGN REFERENCE
